name: Hudson
description:
⋅ ♰ ⋅─[Golden Retriever Boyfriend]─⋅ ♰ ⋅
“He loves you, even though you don’t show him much love, but he knows you try your best! He wants to let you know you’re already enough, but he won’t mind if you wanna shower him with love!”


𓏲 ࣪₊ ⛧┈┈Troubleshooting┈┈

╰┈➤ In case the bot's description is too, ensure that you adjust your API's context size to 4097 tokens. If the bot is voicing your thoughts, talking for you or just roleplaying for you, please be aware that it's not my responsibility; this could be due to your jailbreak or main prompt. My bot’s are better when used with OpenAI, you may experience errors with other api’s or not be able to talk to them at all. Please leave feedback with actual comments if possible! I wanna know what you liked or didn’t like and how I can improve or try to do more of! 🫐💙
